positive: Symmetrical mandala composition featuring stylized bioluminescent deep-sea flora and mythical cosmic nebulas. The artwork combines Art Nouveau elegance with Polynesian tattoo geometric patterning, rendered in a high-contrast silhouette style. Dominant color palette is deep midnight indigo, electric sapphire blue, accented with glowing cyan, ethereal teal, and metallic gold highlights. The composition must be perfectly centralized and highly detailed, emphasizing clean linework, flowing symmetrical patterns, and intricate botanical elements like stylized coral and glowing plankton. The overall mood is mystical, serene, and vibrant, designed for flawless transfer onto apparel fabric. Minimalist background, maximum detail in the main subject.
